title: VendorProduct
description: L2 — A commercial product claiming to realise one or more L1 business capabilities. `productVersion` is the vendor's product version, kept distinct from the base-entry `version` (this entry definition's lifecycle version). Links to the capabilities it claims are modelled as `fulfils` relationships, not entry fields.

productVersion.description: The vendor's product version (NOT the base-entry lifecycle version).

capabilityClaims.description: Free-text capability claims the vendor asserts; resolved to L1 capabilities via VendorCapabilityMapping + fulfils edges.
